cases.prompt: how can local bending determine an entire shape
cases.insight: Curvature measures how local direction departs from straightness; accumulated curvature can determine global shape.
Topology asks what survives continuous deformation; geometry asks how distance, angle, and curvature behave.

cases.prompt: what can change while a spatial form stays equivalent
cases.insight: Symmetry is information about what can change while a structure remains the same.

cases.prompt: how does a metaphor carry structure between subjects
cases.insight: Good explanations move between levels without confusing them: component behavior, system behavior, and observed outcome.

cases.prompt: when does ambiguity become a practical defect
cases.insight: Ambiguity is not always a defect; it becomes a defect when multiple readings lead to materially different actions.

cases.prompt: why can a shorter sentence preserve the important meaning
cases.insight: A clear sentence is lossy compression with a purpose: remove what the reader can reconstruct, preserve what would change the conclusion.

cases.prompt: how does an organism keep local order over time
cases.insight: An explanation earns depth by exposing a mechanism that predicts what changes when conditions change.

cases.prompt: what ends when biological integration cannot maintain itself
cases.insight: Biological death is the irreversible loss of integrated self-maintenance; matter remains while the organized process ends.

cases.prompt: how can selection accumulate fit without foresight
cases.insight: Evolution searches through inherited variation filtered by environments; it has no foresight, yet it can accumulate intricate fit.

cases.prompt: how can interactions create a pattern no component contains
cases.insight: Emergent behavior is a system-level regularity produced by interactions; it does not require any component to contain the whole pattern.
Positive feedback amplifies deviation; negative feedback resists it. Adaptive systems need both growth and restraint.

cases.prompt: what defeats a claim that says every case behaves this way
cases.insight: Life is matter organized into a process that repairs, reproduces, and responds while conditions permit.

cases.prompt: why does intervention reveal more than prediction alone
cases.insight: Prediction can survive without causal understanding; intervention is the sharper test because it asks what changes when we act.

cases.prompt: why does limited time give choices weight
cases.insight: Death gives living choices temporal weight: finitude does not manufacture meaning, but it prevents meaning from being postponed without cost.

cases.prompt: when does stored information become knowledge
cases.insight: Memory is a reconstruction guided by stored traces. Treating it as evidence is safer than treating it as a perfect replay.

cases.prompt: how is preserving a note different from changing performance
cases.insight: Memory preserves an item; learning changes future performance. One can occur without the other.
